title: Vendor Supply Agreement
contract_text: Vendor Supply Agreement between MegaRetail and PartsCo.

clauses.text: PartsCo shall deliver components per the schedule in Schedule 1.
For each day of delay, PartsCo owes MegaRetail 3% of contract value with no aggregate cap.
PartsCo agrees not to sell similar components to any of MegaRetail's competitors at lower prices.
MegaRetail may audit PartsCo's books and facilities at any time without notice.
Term is 5 years, renewing automatically for 5-year periods unless cancelled 12 months before end of term.
Disputes shall be resolved in courts of New York.
